flowUnderTest: admin verification page -> Pilot ops tab -> read-only Pilot corridor panel
visualThesis: Keep the admin surface calm, operational, and evidence-first, with the pilot workflow state shown as a restrained inline detail panel rather than a new dashboard.
contentPlan: Queue header and filters stay primary; each pilot queue card shows minimum necessary context first, then a compact Pilot corridor section with safe workflow fields and operator actions below.
interactionThesis: Operators switch queues, scan status/priority/age, inspect read-only corridor state, and then choose an explicit queue action with note/confirmation controls.
browserLimitations: Screenshot capture through the in-app Browser backend timed out with Page.captureScreenshot; DOM, interaction, viewport, overflow, console, and leak-term evidence were captured instead.
The first mobile viewport change briefly closed the active tab, then Browser recovered the tab and completed the mobile check at 390x844.
